case_title: GAMEZ HOME DECORATORS (MEYNARDO GAMEZ SR.) VS ROZENGURT, ANNA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ROZENGURT, ANNA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT GAMEZ HOME DECORATORS (MEYNARDO GAMEZ SR.) $68.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $68.00, JUDGM ENTERED IN SCA #24379 ON 5-1-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CERT MAIL TO MEYNARDO GAMEZ RETURNED SIGNED.
